svg.title: InvoiceFlow AI workflow architecture diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the complete invoice processing pipeline from Gmail trigger through AI extraction to Google Sheets logging, with two parallel branches for PDF and image processing, and two approval paths for auto-approve and human review.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Gmail trigger node work in n8n?')
sendPrompt('How does the IF node detect PDF vs image?')
sendPrompt('How does the Extract from File node work for PDFs?')
sendPrompt('How does the OCR.space API extract text from invoice images?')
sendPrompt('What does the Set node do in the PDF branch?')
sendPrompt('What does the Set node do in the image branch?')
sendPrompt('How does the Merge node work in n8n?')
sendPrompt('What prompt did you use for Groq AI invoice extraction?')
sendPrompt('How does the validation and auto-approval logic work?')
sendPrompt('How does the auto-approval path work?')
sendPrompt('How does the human approval email work in n8n?')
sendPrompt('How does the approver reply trigger the workflow to resume?')
sendPrompt('What data gets logged to Google Sheets?')
